listitem.para: Set the length of time that pluto will idle without hearing back from the peer. After this period has elapsed with no response and no traffic, pluto will declare the peer dead, and remove the SA. Set value bigger than dpddelay to enable. If dpdtimeout is set, dpddelay also needs to be set.
The default is dpdtimeout=0, meaning disabled.
This option is only valid for &IKEv1;. &IKEv2; uses the retransmit-timeout (any retransmit timeout implies that the IKE SA is dead).

History: the original parameter was called dpdtimeout=; it was renamed to ikev1-dpdtimeout= &Libreswan; 5.0 (with dpdtimeout= as an alias); it was renamed back in &Libreswan; 5.4 (ikev1-dpdtimeout= made the alias).
